name: N-2 ten node rules: 10 g-node-* rules ship across the generated-code-quality-standards tree per §8 N-2
command: n=$(grep -rE 'id: g-node-' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards" 2>/dev/null | grep -oE 'g-node-[0-9]+' | sort -u | wc -l | tr -d ' '); [ "$n" -eq 10 ] && echo "node_rules=$n" 1>&2
